title: astilbe × rosea
intro: Astilbe × rosea, a hybrid of the astilbe plant, is a flowering perennial native to Europe and Asia, known for its attractive plumes of red or pink flowers that rise above its fern-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Astilbe × rosea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Astilbe × rosea can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, colds, and coughs.
